lineage.Process: AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_1 NAMA_PBT TEXT # # 50 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_1 SINGKATAN TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_1 NEGERI TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_1 luas_h DOUBLE 12 4 # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_1 pbt_id TEXT # # 6 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_1 kemaskini DATE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_1 tahun_data SHORT # # 4 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_1 catatan TEXT # # 150 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
CalculateField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_1 GUID ID() PYTHON_9.3 "def ID():\n import uuid\n return '{' + str(uuid.uuid4()) + '}'"
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_2 NAMA_PBT TEXT # # 50 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_2 SINGKATAN TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_2 NEGERI TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_2 luas_h DOUBLE 12 4 # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_2 pbt_id TEXT # # 6 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_2 kemaskini DATE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_2 tahun_data SHORT # # 4 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan_2 catatan TEXT # # 150 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
CalculateField Sempadan_Kawalan_Kelantan NAMA_PBT "Majlis Perbandaran Kota Bahru Bandayara Islam" VB #

itemLocation.linkage: file://\\IKHWAN-PC\G$\ArcGIS Data\Semakan Data\2021\SEMAKAN DATA SEMPADAN OPERASI PBT\Data Sempadan Kawalan PBT 29072021 .gdb
